aggregate_findings.recommendation: Clean script classifications and read-only semantics before relying on automation for broad research loops.
aggregate_findings.title: Every VBT/API lane has useful scripts, but the helper surface is noisy: summary-only write risks, helper manifest lag, and unclassified scripts appear across lanes.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Prioritize Data/Portfolio helpers for explicit credential routing, output-root policy, native VBT surface selection, and no-lookahead evidence.
aggregate_findings.title: Data and Portfolio sit on live/provider/VBT runtime boundaries; they need the strongest config/contract/receipt discipline.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Create thin catalog authority and validators for specific native APIs you actually want to use; do not leave high-value native capabilities parked as indefinite reference-only.
aggregate_findings.title: The VBT642 matrix marks many portfolio/performance/productivity exports as runtime-sensitive/reference-only, so native VBT capabilities are indexed but not directly usable without additional activation.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Add config-owned portfolio constructor lanes only where research workflow needs them, with focused validation against VBT API docs/static lookup.
aggregate_findings.title: Portfolio policy hard-requires from_signals while VBT API/MCP exposes richer order/optimizer/chunked records paths.

aggregate_findings.recommendation: Add a data-lane bridge policy: when to use repo-native provider pulls, when to wrap VBT Data, and what receipt/schema evidence each path owes.
aggregate_findings.title: Repo provider stack is strong for Massive/FINRA/source estate, but VectorBT Pro Data download/update is not clearly mapped as use/bypass per source lane.

repo_index_hits_sample.value: Build outcome labels, conditional outcome analysis, source-intelligence scorecards, and probability calibration.

Validation, QC, audit, probe, smoke, pytest, comparison, integrity, and failure-analysis outputs.
Research experiment datasets, decision traces, candidate rows, relationship tables, blocker rows, sweep outputs, and analysis-ready derived datasets.
Reports and analysis outputs may be audit evidence and require explicit archive/delete decisions.
Reports, audits, validation outputs, and exploratory analysis artifacts.

repo_index_hits_sample.value: The router is where hidden optimization can hide, so it needs its own bounded experiment wave.
block undeclared fallback or implicit optimization
Changing entries during exit comparisons turns exit research into hidden entry optimization.
For Numba indicators with nogil, prefer jitted_loop=true, jitted_warmup=true, n_chunks=auto, and threadpool execution over process-pickled per-combo work.
For non-Numba Python indicators, chunk parameter combinations and distribute chunks across a process engine rather than dispatching thousands of small tasks.

VectorBT Pro exposes parallelizable 2D native kernels such as rolling_mean_nb, rolling_std_nb, rolling_rank_nb, rolling_cov_nb, rolling_zscore_nb, and ma_nb that should replace bespoke Pandas formulas where semantics match.
